_comment: Lean variant of baselines_paper_faithful.json -- detect_gpt n_perturbations dropped from 100 to 10 so the eval pod (Plan A) fits a ~15 h budget. R-Detect and RAIDAR are NOT listed because they run locally in Plan A (R-Detect on laptop GPU; RAIDAR overnight on laptop via Ollama). See docs/RUNPOD_eval_v2.md.
